channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Global study reveals dementia risk factors vary by region
item.description: A large USC-led study of over 214,000 older adults in 14 countries finds that common controllable dementia risk factors differ across regions.

item.title: Growing interest in gut health drives fermentation revival
item.description: More people are focusing on gut health as fibermaxxing trends, colorectal cancer rises in young adults, and personalized microbiome research expands.

item.title: How to Remove a Tick Safely
Adding leflunomide to prednisone may not improve Takayasu arteritis remission
item.description: Leflunomide plus prednisone was well tolerated but did not significantly increase clinical remission of Takayasu arteritis compared to prednisone alone.
